CVE-2015-5276.title: The std::random_device class in libstdc++ in the GNU Compiler Col ...
CVE-2015-5276.description: The std::random_device class in libstdc++ in the GNU Compiler Collection (aka GCC) before 4.9.4 does not properly handle short reads from blocking sources, which makes it easier for context-dependent attackers to predict the random values via unspecified vectors.

CVE-2020-23026.title: A NULL pointer dereference in the main() function dhry_1.c of dhr ...
CVE-2020-23026.description: A NULL pointer dereference in the main() function dhry_1.c of dhrystone 2.1 causes a denial of service (DoS).
